title: Bricked Up
description: Bricked Up is a very sexy mod which adds new brick types and explosives
body:
### Do you feel the current brick selection is lacking? Or you feel that there aren't enough explosives?

ᴼʳ ʸᵒᵘ ʳᵉᵃˡˡʸ ʷᵃⁿᵗ ᵗᵒ ᵍᵉᵗ ʰᵃʳᵈ ʲᵘˢᵗ ˢᵒ ʰᵃʳᵈ 🥵

### Then this is the perfect mod for you which offers the best of both worlds!



**DISCORD** [Click Here](https://discord.gg/k7suDx3m8e)

**REQUIRES GECKOLIB** 

Trailer ↓
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RJyMIhzVHms" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Change your mind about your new bricks? Use a pickaxe to scrape the paint off!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/74zl5VrBClQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Want to ruin families and spread chaos? Introducing Bundle O' Dynamite!
